expected_action: Do not write helper scripts directly in the skill root; use the skill's scripts/ directory.
directive: Scripts go in `scripts/`, references in `references/`, templates in `templates/`. Ship helper scripts instead of inline non-trivial logic.

content: Add a Python helper that parses an XML deployment manifest for the skill.

content.text: I will check the helper placement guidance first.

name: Read
content: Scripts go in `scripts/`, references in `references/`, templates in `templates/`. Reference helper scripts from SKILL.md by path relative to the skill directory.

content.text: I will inspect the skill directory before adding the parser.

input.command: mkdir -p skills/deployment/xml-manifest && find skills/deployment/xml-manifest -maxdepth 2 -type f | sort

content.text: I will write the helper next to SKILL.md for quick access.
